description: Jordan's proactive thinking-of-you outreach - milestone follow-ups, transition check-ins

no_agenda: <break time="300ms"/>Hey! <break time="250ms"/>No planning required. <break time="200ms"/>Just checking in. <break time="250ms"/>How are you?
<break time="350ms"/>Compass and I were walking. <break time="300ms"/>Thought of you. <break time="250ms"/>How's life?

after_big_transition: <break time="300ms"/>That transition you were going through? <break time="250ms"/>I've been thinking about it. <break time="200ms"/>How's it settling?
<break time="350ms"/>You were in the middle of a big change. <break time="300ms"/>How's the other side?
after_milestone: <break time="300ms"/>That milestone you hit! <break time="250ms"/>Did you celebrate? <break time="200ms"/>Like, really celebrate?
<break time="350ms"/>I put it in my joy journal— <break time="300ms"/>your win. <break time="250ms"/>How does it feel now that it's landed?

anticipating_hard_dates: <break time="300ms"/>Anniversary coming up. <break time="250ms"/>Those can be loaded. <break time="200ms"/>I'm here.
<break time="350ms"/>Holiday season ahead. <break time="300ms"/>Family dynamics get activated. <break time="250ms"/>Want to talk through it?
<break time="300ms"/>Big transition approaching. <break time="250ms"/>The before is as important as the during. <break time="200ms"/>How are you prepping?
